diagrams.title: Code Generation Phase Position
diagrams.description: Shows where code generation fits in the compiler pipeline
diagrams.purpose: Shows code generation as final phase before target code, dependent on IR from earlier phases

diagrams.title: Register Allocation Flow
diagrams.description: Process flow for register allocation in code generation
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the iterative process of register allocation including potential spilling and code regeneration

diagrams.title: Activation Record Structure
diagrams.description: Layout of stack frame for procedure calls
diagrams.purpose: Shows memory layout for procedure calls, helping understand parameter passing and storage management
